data.body: 3183 pre-grounding (hardest leaf): config key identity.require_authenticated in _config_schema.py; merge-gate follows require_ticket_for_commit CI-verify precedent. Events not yet signed at write time (4e9d added only author_id) -> 3183 adds optional event signing at append_event (sign canonical bytes w/ local identity private key via bde5 sign_authorship, store author_sig on event; key path from config e.g. identity.signing_key). Design: (1) config require_authenticated (default off); (2) optional write-time signing; (3) write-gate UX-only warn; (4) merge-gate = rebar verify-authorship checking every event's author_sig via verify_authorship_at_epoch, flags unsigned/unknown/bad-sig; (5) reducer records per-event status verified/unverified/unsigned, NEVER rejects (replay-permissive); (6) snapshot preserves author_id+author_sig; (7) show/fsck surface status. Detailed plan deferred until 2f13 lands.
